holdings.infoBox: CLOU is an equity ETF with a total of 40 individual holdings. The top holdings are DigitalOcean Holdings stock at 6.73%, Snowflake at 6.31%, Datadog at 6.31%, Twilio at 4.88%, and Akamai Technologies at 4.66%.

overview.description: The Global X Cloud Computing ETF (CLOU) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Indxx Global Cloud Computing index. The fund provides exposure to a market-cap weighted global equity index of companies involved in the cloud computing industry. CLOU was launched on Apr 12, 2019 and is issued by Global X.

data.title: Europe unveils tech sovereignty package amid growing concerns over reliance on U.S. tech
data.text: The proposals include a new act to bolster advanced chip manufacturing and homegrown cloud computing.
